\tzpentry{ID5926}{Quantum Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5926 introduces Quantum Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} [\hat{\Phi}(x), \hat{\Pi}(y)] = i\hbar \delta(x-y) \end{equation}
